headline: Kroger Brings Back Customer Appreciation Week with Special Savings
summary: The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) today announced the return of its mega-sales event honoring customers with the retailer's hottest deals and exclusive savings during Kroger's Customer Appreciation Week running March 11-17.
